flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Westmont College rose 30% between 2007 and 2010 ($11.9k → $15.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Westmont College rose 10% between 2007 and 2010 ($31.2k → $34.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Westmont College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($48.7k → $53.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Westmont College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.6% → 0.0%).
